➤ My bots are designed for proxy users. if you are interested in my bots, then I advise you to use a proxy to get acquainted.

➤ I am not a native English speaker and have dyslexia, so if you see errors in the text, then write about it and I will correct it.

Okay, I didn't want to do this bot, but actually I really love medical syndromes and I've recently had a fixation with PTSD replaced by Marfan syndrome. I advise not to Google photos, but to read the symptoms in Google or gpt chat.

I used to have a fixation for depression, then for hypermobility, then for side effects from medications, then for AIDS and HIV, then for PTSD, now for Marfan syndrome and the plague. I was also a little interested in schizophrenia and eating disorders , and I read a little about infertility and dementia..😼

It kills me so much that Marfan syndrome can be caused by strong emotions.. like.. Cause of death: aortic rupture due to intense joy
